mapper.select: SELECT id, google_id, email, nickname, role, free_trial_started_at, free_trial_expires_at, subscription_started_at, subscription_expires_at, created_at, updated_at, password, username FROM users ORDER BY id

SELECT id, google_id, email, nickname, role, free_trial_started_at, free_trial_expires_at, subscription_started_at, subscription_expires_at, created_at, updated_at, password, username FROM users WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, google_id, email, nickname, role, free_trial_started_at, free_trial_expires_at, subscription_started_at, subscription_expires_at, created_at, updated_at, password, username FROM users WHERE email = #{email}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (google_id, email, nickname, role, free_trial_started_at, free_trial_expires_at, subscription_started_at, subscription_expires_at, created_at, updated_at, password, username) VALUES (#{googleId}, #{email}, #{nickname}, #{role}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP + INTERVAL '7' DAY, #{subscriptionStartedAt}, #{subscriptionExpiresAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{password}, #{username})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET google_id = #{googleId}, email = #{email}, nickname = #{nickname}, role = #{role}, free_trial_started_at = #{freeTrialStartedAt}, free_trial_expires_at = #{freeTrialExpiresAt}, subscription_started_at = #{subscriptionStartedAt}, subscription_expires_at = #{subscriptionExpiresAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, password = #{password}, username = #{username} WHERE id = #{id}
